name: Oatmeal Cookie Drops with Milk Chocolate and Almonds
recipeIngredient: 2 Hershey's milk chocolate bars (7 oz. each)
1 1/2 cups Old-fashioned oats or quick-cooking rolled oats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut chocolate into approximately 1/2-inch pieces.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until well blended.
4. Add corn syrup, eggs, vanilla, and almond extracts; beat well.
5. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; add to butter mixture, beating until well blended.
6. Stir in oats, chocolate, and almonds (if desired).
7. Drop by heaping teaspoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until edges begin to brown and cookies are set.
9. Cool slightly on the cookie sheet.
10. Transfer cookies to a wire rack; cool completely.
11. Yield: About 4 dozen cookies.
Toast almonds by preheating oven to 350°F, spreading them in a thin layer in a shallow baking pan, and baking for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until light golden brown, then cooling.
